steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The speaker claims to “feel protected” by the mountain—this is the defining claim the quotation must illustrate.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content:
Choice C: “I felt it like a wall / Behind which I was sheltered from a wind”—the speaker explicitly describes feeling sheltered by the mountain.

Choices A, B, and D address the mountain's location, appearance, or the speaker's movement around it.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
